response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has strong software engineering experience and relevant skills in performance optimization, system architecture, and hardware-software co-design (e.g., robotic arms with DLang/Java). However, his background lacks direct experience with AI accelerators, SoC/IP modeling, or deep-learning workload optimization, which are core to the Principal Performance Architect role. His recent work in web/mobile development and AI-agent infrastructure does not align closely with hardware or cloud infrastructure for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong background in system architecture, performance optimization, and hardware-software co-design
Experience with low-latency systems and high-performance databases (e.g., DLang, MongoDB)
Proven ability to work across multiple languages and domains (C++, Java, DLang, TypeScript)
concerns: No direct experience with AI accelerators, SoC/IP modeling, or deep-learning workload optimization
Limited exposure to SIMD/MIMD architecture or GPU workload analysis (preferred qualifications)
Recent career gap (caregiving) and lack of domain-specific experience in cloud infrastructure for AI accelerators
